title: Smoky Chinese Tofu Casserole
description: Earthy, velvety one‑pot tofu dish with a sweet‑spiced speculaas twist and a caramelized broiled finish.

ingredients.name: speculaas spice mix
ingredients.notes: 1 tsp ground cinnamon, ½ tsp nutmeg, ¼ tsp cloves, ¼ tsp ginger, pinch allspice

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and lightly grease a 9x9 dish.
In a bowl whisk together tamari, hoisin, sesame oil, rice vinegar, smoked paprika, speculaas mix, garlic, and ginger. Toss tofu cubes in the mixture and let marinate for 10 minutes.
Sauté kale and carrot in a small amount of sesame oil until wilted, about 3‑4 minutes. Add the marinated tofu, stir to coat, and transfer the mixture to the prepared dish.
Mix the cornstarch slurry and pour over the casserole; spread evenly.
Bake for 25 minutes, flipping once halfway through, until edges brown and sauce thickens.
Remove from oven and broil for 2‑3 minutes to caramelize the top, watching closely to prevent burning.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes, then sprinkle with chopped scallions before serving with steamed rice or noodles.
